audit.tiger_sha256: (not recorded — download from https://www2.census.gov/geo/tiger/TIGER2020/TRACT/tl_2020_53_tract.zip and compute manually)
audit.verification_command:
# Verification command for plan: wa_house_smoke
# Re-run with identical parameters to reproduce:
redist state --state WA --year 2020 --chamber house --districts 98 --label wa_house_smoke --seed <unknown: seed not recorded in manifest>

# Download TIGER source from:
# https://www2.census.gov/geo/tiger/TIGER2020/TRACT/tl_2020_53_tract.zip

# Verify adjacency file:
# sha256sum washington_adjacency_2020.adj.bin  # expected: 
# If not present locally: redist fetch --type adjacency --states WA --year 2020
audit.verification_script: redist state --state WA --year 2020 --chamber house --districts 98 --label wa_house_smoke --seed <unknown: seed not recorded in manifest>
